markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on performance metrics and review new growth initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/GRdoMyPDC65u8fsNzm-epCh6e9Wg5AfE?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Tracking is the Top Priority:** Growth X will implement HubSpot tracking to replace its manual Calendly process, enabling accurate attribution for its primary KPI: revenue.](https://fathom.video/share/GRdoMyPDC65u8fsNzm-epCh6e9Wg5AfE?tab=summary&timestamp=238.0)
  - [**Clear Revenue Goals Set:** Understory will now align its strategy with Growth X's Q1–Q4 revenue targets (e.g., $500k MRR in Q1) and a Q1 goal of 20+ qualified leads.](https://fathom.video/share/GRdoMyPDC65u8fsNzm-epCh6e9Wg5AfE?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
  - [**Backlink Offer Presented:** Understory proposed a paid service for 5 high-quality, contextually relevant backlinks per month at $3,000/mo.](https://fathom.video/share/GRdoMyPDC65u8fsNzm-epCh6e9Wg5AfE?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)
  - [**New AI Tool Demoed:** Understory demoed "Check That," a new AI visibility tool, and offered Growth X a 90-day enterprise trial.](https://fathom.video/share/GRdoMyPDC65u8fsNzm-epCh6e9Wg5AfE?tab=summary&timestamp=1273.0)

## Topics

### Performance Tracking & KPIs

  - [**Problem:** The current Calendly-based lead tracking is manual and lacks attribution data, preventing accurate performance measurement.](https://fathom.video/share/GRdoMyPDC65u8fsNzm-epCh6e9Wg5AfE?tab=summary&timestamp=238.0)
  - [**Solution:** Implement HubSpot tracking to automate attribution and connect organic content to revenue.](https://fathom.video/share/GRdoMyPDC65u8fsNzm-epCh6e9Wg5AfE?tab=summary&timestamp=238.0)
      - [Growth X granted Understory view-only access to its HubSpot instance (`team@growthxlabs.com`).](https://fathom.video/share/GRdoMyPDC65u8fsNzm-epCh6e9Wg5AfE?tab=summary&timestamp=456.0)
      - [Understory will audit the setup and provide a specific implementation plan.](https://fathom.video/share/GRdoMyPDC65u8fsNzm-epCh6e9Wg5AfE?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
  - [**North Star Metric:** Revenue.](https://fathom.video/share/GRdoMyPDC65u8fsNzm-epCh6e9Wg5AfE?tab=summary&timestamp=558.0)
  - [**Revenue Targets (MRR):**](https://fathom.video/share/GRdoMyPDC65u8fsNzm-epCh6e9Wg5AfE?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
      - [Q1: $500k](https://fathom.video/share/GRdoMyPDC65u8fsNzm-epCh6e9Wg5AfE?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
      - [Q2: $625k](https://fathom.video/share/GRdoMyPDC65u8fsNzm-epCh6e9Wg5AfE?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
      - [Q3: $745k](https://fathom.video/share/GRdoMyPDC65u8fsNzm-epCh6e9Wg5AfE?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
      - [Q4: $800k](https://fathom.video/share/GRdoMyPDC65u8fsNzm-epCh6e9Wg5AfE?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
  - [**Q1 Lead Goal:** 20+ qualified leads (defined as booked calls from non-junk intake forms).](https://fathom.video/share/GRdoMyPDC65u8fsNzm-epCh6e9Wg5AfE?tab=summary&timestamp=906.0)

### Backlink Strategy

  - [**Recommendation:** A paid service for building high-quality, contextually relevant backlinks.](https://fathom.video/share/GRdoMyPDC65u8fsNzm-epCh6e9Wg5AfE?tab=summary&timestamp=1132.0)
      - [**Offer:** 5 backlinks/month for $3,000/mo.](https://fathom.video/share/GRdoMyPDC65u8fsNzm-epCh6e9Wg5AfE?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Paid services are more effective than cold outreach for sites with moderate domain authority.](https://fathom.video/share/GRdoMyPDC65u8fsNzm-epCh6e9Wg5AfE?tab=summary&timestamp=1117.0)
  - [Growth X will review the proposal and decide.](https://fathom.video/share/GRdoMyPDC65u8fsNzm-epCh6e9Wg5AfE?tab=summary&timestamp=1261.0)

### "Check That" AI Visibility Tool

  - [**Demo:** Understory presented its new AI visibility tool, "Check That."](https://fathom.video/share/GRdoMyPDC65u8fsNzm-epCh6e9Wg5AfE?tab=summary&timestamp=1273.0)
  - [**Key Features:**](https://fathom.video/share/GRdoMyPDC65u8fsNzm-epCh6e9Wg5AfE?tab=summary&timestamp=1273.0)
      - [**Competitor Analysis:** Tracks presence in AI citations vs. competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/GRdoMyPDC65u8fsNzm-epCh6e9Wg5AfE?tab=summary&timestamp=1302.0)
      - [**Source Identification:** Reveals which URLs drive AI responses, identifying content gaps.](https://fathom.video/share/GRdoMyPDC65u8fsNzm-epCh6e9Wg5AfE?tab=summary&timestamp=1337.0)
      - [**Shared Prompt Library:** Provides instant data on pre-tracked, industry-specific prompts, avoiding the typical 2-month data-gathering delay.](https://fathom.video/share/GRdoMyPDC65u8fsNzm-epCh6e9Wg5AfE?tab=summary&timestamp=1393.0)
  - [**Offer:** Growth X receives a 90-day enterprise trial.](https://fathom.video/share/GRdoMyPDC65u8fsNzm-epCh6e9Wg5AfE?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)

### Other Updates

  - [**Auto-Publishing:** Now live, improving internal efficiency.](https://fathom.video/share/GRdoMyPDC65u8fsNzm-epCh6e9Wg5AfE?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
  - [**Indexing:** Initial review shows no major issues; the SEO specialist team will conduct a deeper analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/GRdoMyPDC65u8fsNzm-epCh6e9Wg5AfE?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)
  - [**YouTube:** A recent finding shows YouTube content drives more LLM citations. Understory will explore optimization recommendations for KS Media, Growth X's YouTube agency.](https://fathom.video/share/GRdoMyPDC65u8fsNzm-epCh6e9Wg5AfE?tab=summary&timestamp=656.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Understory:**](https://fathom.video/share/GRdoMyPDC65u8fsNzm-epCh6e9Wg5AfE?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
      - [Audit Growth X's HubSpot setup and provide an implementation plan for lead tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/GRdoMyPDC65u8fsNzm-epCh6e9Wg5AfE?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
      - [Finalize "Check That" workspace setup and share access details.](https://fathom.video/share/GRdoMyPDC65u8fsNzm-epCh6e9Wg5AfE?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)
      - [Update the recurring meeting invite to the new time (Thursdays, 11:00 AM PT).](https://fathom.video/share/GRdoMyPDC65u8fsNzm-epCh6e9Wg5AfE?tab=summary&timestamp=1529.0)
  - [**Growth X:**](https://fathom.video/share/GRdoMyPDC65u8fsNzm-epCh6e9Wg5AfE?tab=summary&timestamp=1059.0)
      - [Decide on the backlink service proposal.](https://fathom.video/share/GRdoMyPDC65u8fsNzm-epCh6e9Wg5AfE?tab=summary&timestamp=1261.0)
      - [Provide year-to-date lead data from Calendly to establish a baseline.](https://fathom.video/share/GRdoMyPDC65u8fsNzm-epCh6e9Wg5AfE?tab=summary&timestamp=1059.0)
